---
title: "Installing Rhobots"
description: "Step-by-step installation guide for macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel) and Windows."
toc: false
---

Select your operating system below to see the exact steps for your machine.

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── All styles scoped under .rh to avoid Bootstrap conflicts ── */
.rh { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; }

.rh *,
.rh *::before,
.rh *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }

/* Tokens — light */
.rh {
  --rh-accent:      #2355C0;
  --rh-accent-h:    #1A429A;
  --rh-accent-fg:   #FFFFFF;
  --rh-surface:     #FFFFFF;
  --rh-surface-alt: #F0EEE9;
  --rh-border:      #E0DDD6;
  --rh-text:        #1C1A17;
  --rh-muted:       #65615A;
  --rh-faint:       #9C9890;
  --rh-code-bg:     #1C1B18;
  --rh-code-text:   #DDD9D2;
  --rh-code-dim:    #5C5850;
  --rh-info-bg:     #EBF0FA;
  --rh-info-edge:   #2355C0;
  --rh-warn-bg:     #FEF4E0;
  --rh-warn-edge:   #B8750D;
  --rh-radius:      8px;
  --rh-radius-lg:   12px;
  --rh-sh:          0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  .rh {
    --rh-accent:      #4570E0;
    --rh-accent-h:    #567AEE;
    --rh-surface:     #1C1B18;
    --rh-surface-alt: #242320;
    --rh-border:      #2A2926;
    --rh-text:        #EAE6DF;
    --rh-muted:       #9C9890;
    --rh-faint:       #5C5850;
    --rh-code-bg:     #0E0D0B;
    --rh-code-text:   #D9D5CE;
    --rh-code-dim:    #5C5850;
    --rh-info-bg:     #18213C;
    --rh-info-edge:   #4570E0;
    --rh-warn-bg:     #271B08;
    --rh-warn-edge:   #C07D1E;
    --rh-sh:          0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  }
}

[data-theme="dark"] .rh, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .rh {
  --rh-accent:      #4570E0;
  --rh-accent-h:    #567AEE;
  --rh-surface:     #1C1B18;
  --rh-surface-alt: #242320;
  --rh-border:      #2A2926;
  --rh-text:        #EAE6DF;
  --rh-muted:       #9C9890;
  --rh-faint:       #5C5850;
  --rh-code-bg:     #0E0D0B;
  --rh-code-text:   #D9D5CE;
  --rh-code-dim:    #5C5850;
  --rh-info-bg:     #18213C;
  --rh-info-edge:   #4570E0;
  --rh-warn-bg:     #271B08;
  --rh-warn-edge:   #C07D1E;
  --rh-sh:          0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
}

[data-theme="light"] .rh, [data-bs-theme="light"] .rh {
  --rh-accent:      #2355C0;
  --rh-accent-h:    #1A429A;
  --rh-surface:     #FFFFFF;
  --rh-surface-alt: #F0EEE9;
  --rh-border:      #E0DDD6;
  --rh-text:        #1C1A17;
  --rh-muted:       #65615A;
  --rh-faint:       #9C9890;
  --rh-code-bg:     #1C1B18;
  --rh-code-text:   #DDD9D2;
  --rh-code-dim:    #5C5850;
  --rh-info-bg:     #EBF0FA;
  --rh-info-edge:   #2355C0;
  --rh-warn-bg:     #FEF4E0;
  --rh-warn-edge:   #B8750D;
}

/* Back button */
.rh-back {
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--rh-muted);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  font-family: inherit;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  transition: color .1s;
}
.rh-back:hover { color: var(--rh-text); }
.rh-back svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; fill: none; flex-shrink: 0; }
.rh-back.show { display: flex; }

/* Breadcrumb */
.rh-bc {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  font-size: 12.5px;
  color: var(--rh-faint);
  min-height: 22px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.rh-bc-item { color: var(--rh-muted); }
.rh-bc-item.cur { color: var(--rh-text); font-weight: 600; }
.rh-bc-sep { color: var(--rh-faint); }

/* Question header */
.rh-qlabel {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--rh-faint);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.rh-qtitle {
  font-size: 21px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.025em;
  color: var(--rh-text);
  text-wrap: balance;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.rh-qsub {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--rh-muted);
  line-height: 1.58;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

/* Choice cards grid */
.rh-choices {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
@media (max-width: 480px) { .rh-choices { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

.rh-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 18px 20px;
  background: var(--rh-surface);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--rh-border);
  border-radius: var(--rh-radius-lg);
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
  color: var(--rh-text);
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 15px;
  box-shadow: var(--rh-sh);
  transition: border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s;
  /* Override Bootstrap button styles */
  line-height: 1.4;
}
.rh-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--rh-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(35, 85, 192, .14), var(--rh-sh);
}
.rh-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--rh-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

.rh-card-icon { color: var(--rh-muted); }
.rh-card-icon svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; fill: currentColor; display: block; }
.rh-card-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -.01em; }
.rh-card-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--rh-muted); line-height: 1.45; }

/* Info aside */
.rh-aside {
  background: var(--rh-info-bg);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--rh-info-edge);
  border-radius: 0 var(--rh-radius) var(--rh-radius) 0;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  color: var(--rh-muted);
  line-height: 1.55;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.rh-aside strong { color: var(--rh-text); }
.rh-aside code {
  font-family: 'SF Mono','Fira Code','Consolas',monospace;
  font-size: 12.5px;
  background: rgba(35,85,192,.1);
  color: var(--rh-accent);
  padding: 1px 5px;
  border-radius: 3px;
}

/* Screens */
.rh-screen { display: none; }
.rh-screen.on {
  display: block;
  animation: rh-fade .18s ease;
}
@keyframes rh-fade {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(5px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  @keyframes rh-fade { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
}

/* Steps header */
.rh-steps-hd { margin-bottom: 28px; }
.rh-steps-title {
  font-size: 21px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.025em;
  color: var(--rh-text);
  text-wrap: balance;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.rh-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 14px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--rh-muted);
}
.rh-meta span { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
.rh-meta svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; fill: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* Step list */
.rh-steps { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

.rh-step {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 20px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rh-border);
}
.rh-step:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

.rh-step-n {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--rh-accent);
  color: white;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.rh-step-title {
  font-size: 15.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: -.01em;
  color: var(--rh-text);
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.rh-step-body {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--rh-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.rh-step-body p { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.rh-step-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.rh-step-body a { color: var(--rh-accent); text-decoration: none; }
.rh-step-body a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

/* Code block */
.rh-code {
  background: var(--rh-code-bg);
  border-radius: var(--rh-radius);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.rh-code-hd {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
}
.rh-code-lang {
  font-size: 10.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--rh-code-dim);
}
.rh-copy {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--rh-code-dim);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 2px 7px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-family: inherit;
  line-height: 1.4;
  transition: color .1s, background .1s;
}
.rh-copy:hover {
  color: var(--rh-code-text);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.07);
}
.rh-copy.ok { color: #5DB877 !important; }

.rh-code pre {
  padding: 13px 14px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  font-family: 'SF Mono','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Consolas',monospace;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.72;
  color: var(--rh-code-text);
  margin: 0;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  /* Override Quarto/Bootstrap pre styles */
  white-space: pre;
}
.rh-dim { color: var(--rh-code-dim); }

/* Download button — override Bootstrap .btn if present */
.rh-dl {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  padding: 8px 15px;
  background: var(--rh-accent) !important;
  color: white !important;
  border-radius: var(--rh-radius);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  border: none;
  transition: background .12s;
}
.rh-dl:hover { background: var(--rh-accent-h) !important; color: white !important; }
.rh-dl svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; fill: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* Callouts — using rh- prefix so they don't clash with Quarto's own callouts */
.rh-callout {
  border-radius: var(--rh-radius);
  padding: 11px 13px;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  line-height: 1.55;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.rh-info { background: var(--rh-info-bg); border-left: 3px solid var(--rh-info-edge); color: var(--rh-muted); }
.rh-warn { background: var(--rh-warn-bg); border-left: 3px solid var(--rh-warn-edge); color: var(--rh-muted); }
.rh-callout strong { color: var(--rh-text); }
.rh-callout code {
  font-family: 'SF Mono','Fira Code','Consolas',monospace;
  font-size: 12.5px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  padding: 1px 5px;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
</style>

<div class="rh">

  <!-- Back + breadcrumb -->
  <button class="rh-back" id="rhBack" onclick="rhBack()">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 15 15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M9 3L4 7.5 9 12"/>
    </svg>
    Back
  </button>
  <div class="rh-bc" id="rhBc"></div>

  <!-- ── OS selection ── -->
  <div class="rh-screen on" id="rh-os">
    <p class="rh-qlabel">Step 1 of 2</p>
    <p class="rh-qtitle">What operating system are you using?</p>
    <p class="rh-qsub">Rhobots runs on macOS and Windows. Your installation steps depend on your system.</p>
    <div class="rh-choices">
      <button class="rh-card" onclick="rhGo('mac-chip', ['macOS'])">
        <span class="rh-card-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="rh-card-name">macOS</span>
        <span class="rh-card-desc">Mac laptops and desktops, any version</span>
      </button>
      <button class="rh-card" onclick="rhGo('win', ['Windows'])">
        <span class="rh-card-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 12V6.75l6-1.32v6.48L3 12m17-9v8.75l-10 .15V5.21L20 3M3 13l6 .09v6.81l-6-1.15V13m17 .25V22l-10-1.91V13.1l10 .15z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="rh-card-name">Windows</span>
        <span class="rh-card-desc">Windows 10 or 11, 64-bit</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Mac chip selection ── -->
  <div class="rh-screen" id="rh-mac-chip">
    <p class="rh-qlabel">Step 2 of 2</p>
    <p class="rh-qtitle">What type of Mac do you have?</p>
    <p class="rh-qsub">The steps are nearly identical, but Apple Silicon Macs can use GPU acceleration for faster embedding.</p>
    <div class="rh-aside">
      <strong>How to check:</strong> Click the Apple () menu in the top-left → <strong>About This Mac</strong>.<br>
      Look for <strong>Chip: Apple M…</strong> (Apple Silicon) or <strong>Processor: Intel…</strong> (Intel).
    </div>
    <div class="rh-choices">
      <button class="rh-card" onclick="rhGo('apple', ['macOS', 'Apple Silicon'])">
        <span class="rh-card-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="rh-card-name">Apple Silicon</span>
        <span class="rh-card-desc">M1, M2, M3, M4 — any Mac from late 2020 onwards</span>
      </button>
      <button class="rh-card" onclick="rhGo('intel', ['macOS', 'Intel'])">
        <span class="rh-card-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="rh-card-name">Intel</span>
        <span class="rh-card-desc">Intel Core i5 / i7 / i9 — older Mac models</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Apple Silicon steps ── -->
  <div class="rh-screen" id="rh-apple">
    <div class="rh-steps-hd">
      <p class="rh-qlabel">macOS — Apple Silicon</p>
      <p class="rh-steps-title">Installation guide for M1, M2, M3 and M4 Macs</p>
      <div class="rh-meta">
        <span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M8 1.5a6.5 6.5 0 100 13 6.5 6.5 0 000-13zM0 8a8 8 0 1116 0A8 8 0 010 8z"/><path d="M8 4a.5.5 0 01.5.5v3.793l2.354 2.353a.5.5 0 01-.708.708l-2.5-2.5A.5.5 0 017.5 8.5v-4A.5.5 0 018 4z"/></svg> ~25 minutes</span>
        <span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M1 3.5A1.5 1.5 0 012.5 2h11A1.5 1.5 0 0115 3.5v9A1.5 1.5 0 0113.5 14h-11A1.5 1.5 0 011 12.5v-9zm2 0v9h10v-9H3z"/></svg> ~3 GB free space</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rh-steps">
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">1</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install Xcode Command Line Tools</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>R needs a C++ compiler to install packages with native code. Xcode Command Line Tools provides this — it is a small separate package (~2 GB), not the full Xcode IDE.</p><p>Open <strong>Terminal</strong> (Cmd+Space → type "Terminal") and run:</p></div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'xcode-select --install')">Copy</button></div><pre>xcode-select --install</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">A dialog will appear — click <strong>Install</strong> and wait (5–15 minutes). If you see "already installed", skip to step 2.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">2</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install R for Apple Silicon</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Download the <strong>arm64</strong> build of R from CRAN — this version is optimised for M-series chips.</p></div>
          <a class="rh-dl" href="https://cran.r-project.org/bin/macosx/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M.5 9.9a.5.5 0 01.5.5v2.5a1 1 0 001 1h12a1 1 0 001-1v-2.5a.5.5 0 011 0v2.5a2 2 0 01-2 2H2a2 2 0 01-2-2v-2.5a.5.5 0 01.5-.5z"/><path d="M7.646 11.854a.5.5 0 00.708 0l3-3a.5.5 0 00-.708-.708L8.5 10.293V1.5a.5.5 0 00-1 0v8.793L5.354 8.146a.5.5 0 10-.708.708l3 3z"/></svg>Download R for macOS (CRAN)</a>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">On the CRAN page, download the file ending in <strong>-arm64.pkg</strong>. Run the installer and follow the prompts.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">3</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install required R packages</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Open R (or RStudio) and run both lines:</p></div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'install.packages(c(\"remotes\", \"gutenbergr\"))\nremotes::install_github(\"JPvdP/RhoBots\")')">Copy</button></div><pre>install.packages(c("remotes", "gutenbergr"))
remotes::install_github("JPvdP/RhoBots")</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">The second command compiles C++ code. Compiler output will scroll by — this is normal and takes 1–3 minutes.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">4</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Set up the torch backend</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Rhobots uses PyTorch through R's <code>torch</code> package to run embedding models. The C++ backend (~560 MB) is downloaded separately:</p></div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'library(Rhobots)\nrhobots_install()')">Copy</button></div><pre>library(Rhobots)
rhobots_install()</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-warn"><strong>Restart R when prompted.</strong> The torch backend will not load until you start a fresh session.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">5</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Run the demo</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>After restarting R, verify everything works. On Apple Silicon you can pass <code>device = "mps"</code> to use the GPU (2–3× faster for embedding):</p></div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'library(Rhobots)\nrhobots_demo()                   # CPU — works on any Mac\nrhobots_demo(device = \"mps\")     # Apple Silicon GPU — faster')">Copy</button></div><pre>library(Rhobots)
rhobots_demo()                   <span class="rh-dim"># CPU — works on any Mac</span>
rhobots_demo(device = "mps")     <span class="rh-dim"># Apple Silicon GPU — faster</span></pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">The first run downloads a small embedding model (~22 MB). Subsequent runs use the cached model and start faster.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Intel steps ── -->
  <div class="rh-screen" id="rh-intel">
    <div class="rh-steps-hd">
      <p class="rh-qlabel">macOS — Intel</p>
      <p class="rh-steps-title">Installation guide for Intel Mac</p>
      <div class="rh-meta">
        <span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M8 1.5a6.5 6.5 0 100 13 6.5 6.5 0 000-13zM0 8a8 8 0 1116 0A8 8 0 010 8z"/><path d="M8 4a.5.5 0 01.5.5v3.793l2.354 2.353a.5.5 0 01-.708.708l-2.5-2.5A.5.5 0 017.5 8.5v-4A.5.5 0 018 4z"/></svg> ~30 minutes</span>
        <span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M1 3.5A1.5 1.5 0 012.5 2h11A1.5 1.5 0 0115 3.5v9A1.5 1.5 0 0113.5 14h-11A1.5 1.5 0 011 12.5v-9zm2 0v9h10v-9H3z"/></svg> ~3 GB free space</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rh-callout rh-info" style="margin-bottom:24px"><strong>CPU only.</strong> Intel Macs do not support Apple's MPS GPU backend — only <code>device = "cpu"</code> is available. Embedding ~900 paragraphs takes roughly 3–5 minutes.</div>
    <div class="rh-steps">
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">1</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install Xcode Command Line Tools</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Open <strong>Terminal</strong> and run:</p></div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">Terminal</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'xcode-select --install')">Copy</button></div><pre>xcode-select --install</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">Click <strong>Install</strong> in the dialog. If it says "already installed", proceed to step 2.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">2</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install R for Intel Mac</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Download the <strong>x86_64</strong> build of R from CRAN.</p></div>
          <a class="rh-dl" href="https://cran.r-project.org/bin/macosx/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M.5 9.9a.5.5 0 01.5.5v2.5a1 1 0 001 1h12a1 1 0 001-1v-2.5a.5.5 0 011 0v2.5a2 2 0 01-2 2H2a2 2 0 01-2-2v-2.5a.5.5 0 01.5-.5z"/><path d="M7.646 11.854a.5.5 0 00.708 0l3-3a.5.5 0 00-.708-.708L8.5 10.293V1.5a.5.5 0 00-1 0v8.793L5.354 8.146a.5.5 0 10-.708.708l3 3z"/></svg>Download R for macOS (CRAN)</a>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">On the CRAN page, download the file ending in <strong>-x86_64.pkg</strong> (not arm64).</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">3</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install required R packages</div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'install.packages(c(\"remotes\", \"gutenbergr\"))\nremotes::install_github(\"JPvdP/RhoBots\")')">Copy</button></div><pre>install.packages(c("remotes", "gutenbergr"))
remotes::install_github("JPvdP/RhoBots")</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">Compiler output during the second command is normal — takes 1–3 minutes.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">4</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Set up the torch backend</div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'library(Rhobots)\nrhobots_install()')">Copy</button></div><pre>library(Rhobots)
rhobots_install()</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-warn"><strong>Restart R when prompted</strong> before proceeding to step 5.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">5</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Run the demo</div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'library(Rhobots)\nrhobots_demo()')">Copy</button></div><pre>library(Rhobots)
rhobots_demo()</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">Embedding on CPU takes roughly 3–5 minutes on a modern Intel Mac. The model is cached after the first run.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Windows steps ── -->
  <div class="rh-screen" id="rh-win">
    <div class="rh-steps-hd">
      <p class="rh-qlabel">Windows 10 / 11</p>
      <p class="rh-steps-title">Installation guide for Windows</p>
      <div class="rh-meta">
        <span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M8 1.5a6.5 6.5 0 100 13 6.5 6.5 0 000-13zM0 8a8 8 0 1116 0A8 8 0 010 8z"/><path d="M8 4a.5.5 0 01.5.5v3.793l2.354 2.353a.5.5 0 01-.708.708l-2.5-2.5A.5.5 0 017.5 8.5v-4A.5.5 0 018 4z"/></svg> ~40 minutes</span>
        <span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M1 3.5A1.5 1.5 0 012.5 2h11A1.5 1.5 0 0115 3.5v9A1.5 1.5 0 0113.5 14h-11A1.5 1.5 0 011 12.5v-9zm2 0v9h10v-9H3z"/></svg> ~5 GB free space</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rh-steps">
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">1</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install Visual C++ Redistributable 2022</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>The torch package requires the Microsoft Visual C++ runtime to load its native libraries. This is a small installer (~25 MB) from Microsoft.</p></div>
          <a class="rh-dl" href="https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M.5 9.9a.5.5 0 01.5.5v2.5a1 1 0 001 1h12a1 1 0 001-1v-2.5a.5.5 0 011 0v2.5a2 2 0 01-2 2H2a2 2 0 01-2-2v-2.5a.5.5 0 01.5-.5z"/><path d="M7.646 11.854a.5.5 0 00.708 0l3-3a.5.5 0 00-.708-.708L8.5 10.293V1.5a.5.5 0 00-1 0v8.793L5.354 8.146a.5.5 0 10-.708.708l3 3z"/></svg>Download VC++ Redistributable (Microsoft)</a>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">Run <strong>vc_redist.x64.exe</strong> and click Install. Restart Windows if prompted before continuing.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">2</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install R</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Download and install the 64-bit version of R for Windows.</p></div>
          <a class="rh-dl" href="https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/base/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M.5 9.9a.5.5 0 01.5.5v2.5a1 1 0 001 1h12a1 1 0 001-1v-2.5a.5.5 0 011 0v2.5a2 2 0 01-2 2H2a2 2 0 01-2-2v-2.5a.5.5 0 01.5-.5z"/><path d="M7.646 11.854a.5.5 0 00.708 0l3-3a.5.5 0 00-.708-.708L8.5 10.293V1.5a.5.5 0 00-1 0v8.793L5.354 8.146a.5.5 0 10-.708.708l3 3z"/></svg>Download R for Windows (CRAN)</a>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">Accept the default options during installation. RStudio is optional but recommended.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">3</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install Rtools</div>
          <div class="rh-step-body"><p>Rtools provides the C++ compiler R uses to build packages with native code. The version number must match your R version (e.g. Rtools45 for R 4.5, Rtools46 for R 4.6).</p></div>
          <a class="rh-dl" href="https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M.5 9.9a.5.5 0 01.5.5v2.5a1 1 0 001 1h12a1 1 0 001-1v-2.5a.5.5 0 011 0v2.5a2 2 0 01-2 2H2a2 2 0 01-2-2v-2.5a.5.5 0 01.5-.5z"/><path d="M7.646 11.854a.5.5 0 00.708 0l3-3a.5.5 0 00-.708-.708L8.5 10.293V1.5a.5.5 0 00-1 0v8.793L5.354 8.146a.5.5 0 10-.708.708l3 3z"/></svg>Download Rtools (CRAN)</a>
          <div class="rh-step-body" style="margin-top:8px"><p>After installing, verify it is working by running this in R — it should return a path, not an empty string:</p></div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'Sys.which(\"make\")')">Copy</button></div><pre>Sys.which("make")  <span class="rh-dim"># should return a path, not ""</span></pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">If the result is <code>""</code>, restart R after installing Rtools and try again.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">4</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Install required R packages</div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'install.packages(c(\"remotes\", \"gutenbergr\"))\nremotes::install_github(\"JPvdP/RhoBots\")')">Copy</button></div><pre>install.packages(c("remotes", "gutenbergr"))
remotes::install_github("JPvdP/RhoBots")</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-info">Compiler output during the second command is normal and takes 2–5 minutes.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">5</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Set up the torch backend</div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'library(Rhobots)\nrhobots_install()')">Copy</button></div><pre>library(Rhobots)
rhobots_install()</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-warn"><strong>Restart R when prompted</strong> before proceeding to step 6.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-step">
        <div class="rh-step-n">6</div>
        <div>
          <div class="rh-step-title">Run the demo</div>
          <div class="rh-code"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'library(Rhobots)\nrhobots_demo()')">Copy</button></div><pre>library(Rhobots)
rhobots_demo()</pre></div>
          <div class="rh-callout rh-warn">
            <strong>If you see a CUDA error</strong> and your machine has an NVIDIA GPU, run the following and then restart R:
            <div class="rh-code" style="margin-top:8px"><div class="rh-code-hd"><span class="rh-code-lang">R</span><button class="rh-copy" onclick="rhCopy(this,'torch::install_torch(type = \"cpu\")')">Copy</button></div><pre>torch::install_torch(type = "cpu")</pre></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div><!-- /.rh -->

<script>
(function () {
  const labels = {
    'os': 'Start', 'mac-chip': 'macOS',
    'apple': 'Apple Silicon', 'intel': 'Intel Mac', 'win': 'Windows'
  };
  let hist = [];

  function current() {
    const el = document.querySelector('.rh-screen.on');
    return el ? el.id.replace('rh-', '') : 'os';
  }

  function show(key, path) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.rh-screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('on'));
    const t = document.getElementById('rh-' + key);
    if (t) t.classList.add('on');

    // breadcrumb
    const bc = document.getElementById('rhBc');
    const crumbs = (path || []).map(p =>
      '<span class="rh-bc-item">' + p + '</span><span class="rh-bc-sep">›</span>'
    ).join('') + (key !== 'os' ? '<span class="rh-bc-item cur">' + (labels[key] || key) + '</span>' : '');
    bc.innerHTML = crumbs;

    // back button
    const btn = document.getElementById('rhBack');
    if (btn) btn.className = 'rh-back' + (hist.length > 0 ? ' show' : '');

    // scroll to top of wizard
    const rh = document.querySelector('.rh');
    if (rh) rh.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
  }

  window.rhGo = function (key, path) {
    hist.push(current());
    show(key, path);
  };

  window.rhBack = function () {
    if (!hist.length) return;
    const prev = hist.pop();
    const path = hist.map(k => labels[k] || k);
    show(prev, path);
  };

  window.rhCopy = function (btn, text) {
    const done = () => {
      btn.textContent = 'Copied';
      btn.classList.add('ok');
      setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy'; btn.classList.remove('ok'); }, 1800);
    };
    if (navigator.clipboard) {
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(done).catch(() => fallback(text, done));
    } else {
      fallback(text, done);
    }
  };

  function fallback(text, done) {
    const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.value = text;
    ta.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;opacity:0;top:0;left:0';
    document.body.appendChild(ta);
    ta.select();
    try { document.execCommand('copy'); done(); } catch(e) {}
    document.body.removeChild(ta);
  }
})();
</script>
```
